title: Fire from Silicon Valley
summary: By chance, I attended an AI workshop at Columbia University last week. It left me with a whirlwind of emotions. On one hand, I was awestruck by the current success and future potential of AI; on the other, I found myself standing once again at a major crossroads in my life.

title: Philosophy and AI
summary: A reflection on how AI systems reshape the way we define reasoning, judgment, and responsibility.

title: Macro-trends in Tech Consulting
summary: An outlook on consulting models that blend analytics, workflow automation, and applied AI governance.

title: MSBA Learning Notes
summary: How coursework in statistics and product thinking can be translated into practical project delivery.
